personal.name: Andri
personal.subtitle: Let's make tech work for you
bio: Hi! My name is Andri and I work at Aftra.io as Technical Success Manager

As an experienced IT specialist, with a focus on customer success, cybersecurity, server management, and reliable technical support, I am dedicated to ensuring that customers achieve the best possible results with Aftra.io's solutions.
I have extensive experience in ensuring the smooth operation of IT systems on Windows, Linux, and MacOS.

With a background as Chief Technical Architect at RVX Productions and extensive experience in system administration at various companies such as Isavia Air Navigation Systems and Terra Umhverfisþjónusta,
I leverage my deep technical knowledge to support and ensure the success of Aftra.io's customers.

My passion lies in applying my skills in an environment that values continuous improvement and proactive problem-solving to ensure customer satisfaction and success. I am committed to contributing to the success and security of Aftra.io's customers and systems.

projects.name: Ansjósur.is

projects.name: LCARS (Library Access And Retrieval System)

projects.name: Myrkur

projects.name: Skáld (Retired)
projects.description: AI Thought Experiment, the entity wakes up at 3:15am UTC every night and writes a poem about humanity's future and AI's impact on our development. This poem then gets sent to a image generator, which interprets the poem and dreams up a vision of the poem.

projects.name: ANDRI.IS - Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern cyberpunk-themed portfolio website with Three.js 3D elements, featuring a warped grid background, floating geometric shapes, and glassmorphism design. Self-hosted on Debian VPS.

projects.name: Super Secret Sharing
projects.description: A secure platform to temporarily share secrets and passwords with client-side encryption, burn-on-read functionality, time limits (1 hour to 7 days), view controls, and zero-knowledge architecture ensuring the server never sees unencrypted data.
